productDisplayName: Probase Men Check Navy Blue Shirt
description: Composition Grey shirt with blue and red checks, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and red piping,, mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, full front buttoned placket, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not soak or bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print/embroidery Designed in a balanced combination of blue, red and grey, this shirt from probase adds that extra bounce to your style. Feel light and comfortable in the cotton fabric and look casual with the curved hemline. Team it with chinos and casual boots. Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11” and shoulders 17.5”
